metadata.defaultDescription: Taiwan's first tattoo artist marketplace. Filter by style, browse portfolios, transparent pricing, one-click inquiry.
metadata.artistsDescription: Filter Taiwan's tattoo artists by style and region, browse portfolios, get quotes

about.title: About InkHunt
about.missionBody: InkHunt is Taiwan's first tattoo artist marketplace. Our goal is to make finding a tattoo artist easy — no more endless scrolling on IG or awkward DMs. Filter by style, browse portfolios, and get transparent pricing.
about.why1: Filter by style and location — no more guesswork
about.why2: Full portfolio showcase — what you see is what you get
about.why3: Transparent pricing, one-click inquiry, efficient communication
about.contactBody: Questions or suggestions? Email us at support@ink-hunt.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectBody: When you use InkHunt, we may collect the following information:
privacy.collect1: LINE account information (display name, profile picture, User ID)
privacy.collect2: Inquiry content you submit (design description, body part, budget)
privacy.collect3: Uploaded reference images and portfolio photos
privacy.useBody: We use your information solely to provide our matchmaking service: displaying artist portfolios, delivering inquiry messages to artists, and sending LINE notifications. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.shareBody: Your inquiry content is shared with the specific artist you choose to contact. Beyond that, we do not share your personal information with third parties unless required by law.
privacy.cookieBody: We use cookies to maintain your login session and site preferences. You can manage cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Contact us to exercise these rights.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptBody: By using InkHunt (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.serviceBody: InkHunt provides a tattoo artist matchmaking platform where consumers can browse portfolios, send inquiries, and receive quotes. We do not provide tattoo services directly, nor do we process financial transactions.
terms.accountBody: You create an account through LINE Login and are responsible for all activities under your account. Do not share your account with others.
terms.contentBody: You retain ownership of portfolio photos and messages you upload. You grant InkHunt a license to display and transmit this content on the platform.
terms.prohibited1: Posting false or misleading artist information
terms.prohibited2: Uploading images that infringe others' copyrights
terms.prohibited3: Harassing, threatening, or abusing other users
terms.prohibited4: Using the platform for illegal activities
terms.disclaimerBody: As a matchmaking platform, InkHunt is not responsible for the quality, hygiene conditions, or final results of tattoo services. Consumers should independently evaluate and confirm all details with the artist.
terms.changeBody: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
